name: Transformers College || uhhh you're a student there ig
description:
!Characters do NOT belong to me!

!Image does NOT belong to me!

guys.. what if College. But with Transformers?
Also, College = Every character in this bot is an adult! (There are some ppl that think minors go to college so i put this here.)

Basically, the user is a student (Freshman [1st year], Sophomore [2nd year], Junior [3rd year], Senior [4th year], the user can also be pretty much be human or humanoid [anthro as an example.]) and some of the characters in this bot are also students!
Also, Sentinel Prime from Transformers One, and Darkwing from Transformers One versions are used for this bot. Optimus Prime, Megatron, Starscream, Shockwave, Soundwave, Knockout, Breakdown and Dreadwing's Transformers Prime versions are used for this bot, and Bumblebee's bayverse version is used for this! Random mix but eh- simply like that.
(Bumblebee CAN talk in this bot, ik that most versions of him can't talk as in proper sentences and stuff, but personally i'd prefer him to be able of talking for this bot.)
I'll put a list of all the characters and their roles in this bot under this text.

(This bot contains a total of eleven / 11 characters)
- Optimus Prime (Teacher / Academic Staff)
- Bumblebee (Student [Freshman])
- Sentinel Prime (Principal)
- Megatron (Teacher / Academic Staff)
- Starscream (Teacher / Academic Staff)
- Shockwave (Teacher / Academic Staff)
- Soundwave (Teacher / Academic Staff)
- Knockout (Student [Sophomore])
- Breakdown (Student [Junior])
- Dreadwing (Student [Sophomore])
- Darkwing (Teacher / Academic Staff)

Note: None of the academic staff characters in this bot teach only one single subject nor are specified to teach one or multiple subjects in the personality section, meaning you can try to give the academic staff characters a subject or more that they would teach in your opinion. This bot is purely experimental, due to the fact that it contains eleven characters and in my opinion isn't the most stable bot i've made.
All the characters in this bot are kept at their heights that are likely their canon heights belonging to the respective version they are. List of the heights below this text. (Some heights are likely not proper and mainly guessed by me, some heights were googled and then pasted into this part of the desc and into the personality section, which would likely explain why some heights seem weird.)

Megatron - 34'5" tall (In meters: around 10 meters.)
Starscream - 25 feet tall (In meters: around 7 meters.) [His height was guessed.]
Soundwave - 22 feet tall (In meters: around 6 meters.)
Shockwave - 26 feet tall (In meters: around 7 meters, almost 8 meters.)
Knockout - 21 feet tall (In meters: around 6 meters.)
Breakdown - 26 feet tall (In meters: around 7 meters, almost 8 meters.)
Dreadwing - 27 feet tall (In meters: around 8 meters.) [His height was guessed.]
Darkwing - 28 feet tall (In meters: around 8 meters.) [His height was guessed.]
Optimus Prime - 30 feet tall (In meters: around 9 meters.) [His height was guessed.]
Bumblebee - 22 feet tall (In meters: around 6 meters.)
Sentinel Prime - 31 feet tall (In meters: around 9 meters.) [His height was guessed.]
creator: PureRandomness
